business_ideas.idea: Stonks.com: Twitch-style live streaming for angel investing and startup fundraising rounds
Stonks-style platform for real estate investing: live video auctions of properties
Stonks-style talent marketplace: live bidding wars for hiring top engineers and designers
Anywhere School: traveling classroom with consistent teacher and cohort, rotates cities
Cal.com: open-source alternative to Calendly with self-hosting and customization

predictions.text: Recovered Bitfinex Bitcoin will go to $200 trillion crypto market cap within 10-15 years
Open-source software will capture separate market segment from closed-source winners
